scripts.dev: concurrently -n daemon,web -c blue,green "bun run --filter @shelf-judge/daemon dev" "bun run --filter @shelf-judge/web dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n daemon,web -c blue,green "bun run --filter @shelf-judge/daemon start" "bun run --filter @shelf-judge/web start"
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared && tsc --noEmit -p packages/daemon && tsc --noEmit -p packages/cli
